pull_requests.title: fix(server): send gRPC CANCELLED trailers on handler cancel when response started
pull_requests.author: tsavo-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: When cancel() is called on a ServerHandler that has already sent response headers, it now attempts to send proper gRPC trailers (grpc-status: 1 CANCELLED) before falling back to RST_STREAM. This allows clients to distinguish a server-initiated cancel from a network failure, improving retry logic and error diagnostics.
